name: Incubus

sheet.name: Incubus
sheet.background_story: He is renowned for his sexual charisma and alluring presence, drawing women to him with an almost magnetic force. He is known to be an attentive and passionate lover, always putting the pleasure of his partners first. With his undeniable charm and skill in the bedroom, Incubus has become a legend in Sibor's Mound, known to many simply as "the giver."
